title: carex pyrenaica
intro: Carex pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, Carex pyrenaica has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing coughs, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Carex pyrenaica can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling the dried roots and leaves in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
